title: Bitdeer Technologies Q1 Results and Analyst Forecast Updates
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ: BTDR) released mixed first-quarter earnings results on Thursday. While the company exceeded revenue expectations with $188.930 million in sales versus the anticipated $187.271 million, it fell short on the earnings front, posting an adjusted loss of 46 cents per share compared to the projected loss of 37 cents per share. The stock experienced a significant decline, dropping 11.4% to close at $13.09 on Friday following the announcement. Despite the mixed results, three major analysts revised their price targets upward: Needham's John Todaro maintained a Buy rating while increasing the price target from $18 to $19. Rosenblatt's Kevin Cassidy kept a Buy recommendation and raised the target from $18 to $25. Cantor Fitzgerald's Brett Knoblauch maintained a Neutral stance but increased the price target from $11 to $15. Management highlighted several accomplishments, including launching the SEALMINER A4 mining rig, activating development of a Norwegian AI data center facility, and growing the AI Cloud business to exceeding $69 million in annualized run-rate revenue.
